section1.title: Engineering Excellence
section1.body: Nigerian-owned mechanical and civil engineering firm delivering international-standard services to oil & gas, cement, and industrial sectors.

section3.title: Why Choose Okochris
section3.body: We combine local expertise with international standards to deliver exceptional engineering solutions tailored to your unique needs.

items.title: Local Expertise, Global Standards
items.body: We understand the Nigerian market while maintaining international quality standards in everything we do.

items.title: End-to-End Solutions
items.body: From concept to execution, we handle every aspect of your engineering needs with precision and care.

items.title: Proven Track Record
items.body: Years of delivering excellence across piping, mechanical structures, and industrial equipment fabrication.

section4.title: Engineering Services
section4.body: Comprehensive engineering solutions designed to elevate your business and exceed expectations.

items.title: Piping & Pipeline Installation
items.body: Design, fabrication, construction and installation of process piping and pipeline systems for oil and gas facilities.

items.title: Mechanical Structures
items.body: Design, fabrication and installation of pipe racks, equipment supports, and structural steel for industrial facilities.

items.title: Surface Treatment & Coating
items.body: Comprehensive surface preparation, blasting, painting and coating services for industrial equipment and structures.

items.title: Equipment Fabrication
items.body: Custom fabrication and installation of pressure vessels, tanks, heat exchangers, and process equipment.

section5.title: Our Vision
section5.body: To be the customer's delight, operating in a quality, profitable, and responsible manner. Providing exclusive services that give customers confidence and pride.

section1.title: About OKOCHRIS Engineering
section1.body: Your trusted partner in engineering excellence. We transform challenges into opportunities with local expertise and global standards.

section2.title: Who We Are
section2.body: Okochris Engineering Limited is a Nigerian-based mechanical and civil engineering company specializing in the design, fabrication, installation, and maintenance of industrial systems. We serve clients across the oil & gas, cement, power, and manufacturing sectors.

section3.title: Our Vision
section3.body: To be the customer's delight, operating in a quality, profitable, and responsible manner.

section4.title: Our Mission
section4.body: Providing exclusive services that give customers confidence and pride — a certificate lift.

section5.title: Core Values
section5.body: Non-negotiable principles governing every decision, conversation, and project execution.

items.title: Integrity
items.body: We are honest about what we can deliver, transparent when challenges arise, and consistent in doing what we say we will do.

items.title: Innovation
items.body: The most effective engineering solutions are not always the most obvious ones. We invest in finding better methods and smarter processes.

items.title: Resilience
items.body: Our team is trained and conditioned to solve problems, maintain quality under pressure, and deliver results regardless of obstacles.

items.title: Leadership
items.body: We lead through the quality of our work, the clarity of our communication, and the accountability of our people.

section6.title: Our Value Proposition
section6.body: What sets us apart in the engineering industry.

items.title: Local Expertise
items.body: Deep understanding of the Nigerian market, regulations, and operational challenges.

items.title: Global Standards
items.body: International quality standards and best practices in all our services.

items.title: End-to-End Solutions
items.body: Comprehensive services from concept to execution and ongoing support.

section9.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
section9.body: Let's discuss how we can deliver international-standard engineering services for your facility.

section1.title: Engineering Services
section1.body: Comprehensive mechanical and civil engineering solutions for industrial facilities across Nigeria.

section2.title: Piping & Pipeline Installation
section2.body: Design, fabrication, construction and installation of process piping and pipeline systems for oil and gas and petrochemical facilities. Competent in interpretation of isometric drawings, weld procedure qualification, NDT coordination, pressure testing, and final documentation handover.

section3.title: Mechanical Structures
section3.body: Fabrication and installation of pipe rack steel structures, gallery steel structures, crusher station frameworks, and conveyor support structures. Delivering structural scopes that meet dimensional accuracy, load-bearing, and surface treatment specifications.

section4.title: Surface Treatment
section4.body: Professional blasting and painting services executed to client specifications. Covers oil storage tanks, structural steel, and mechanical equipment with strict adherence to surface preparation standards and coating system requirements.

section5.title: Equipment Fabrication & Assembly
section5.body: Precision fabrication of cyclones, bins, hoppers, and assembly of complex industrial equipment packages. Quality inspection at every stage from material verification through final surface treatment and commissioning.

section6.title: Maintenance & Shutdowns
section6.body: Planned preventive maintenance programs and responsive corrective maintenance services designed to eliminate or drastically reduce unplanned downtime. Each program is meticulously evaluated before execution begins.

section7.title: Equipment Leasing & Logistics
section7.body: Equipment leasing and logistics support services allowing clients to augment operational capacity without capital overhead. Includes vehicles, heavy machinery, and specialized engineering equipment deployment.

section8.title: Manpower Supply
section8.body: Structured manpower supply service that identifies, vets, trains, and deploys skilled workers. Covers welders, fitters, riggers, scaffolders, operators, and other skilled engineering roles with full competency assurance.

section9.title: Ready to Start?
section9.body: Let's discuss how OKOCHRIS Engineering can deliver international-standard services for your facility.

section1.title: Get In Touch
section1.body: Have a project in mind? Let's discuss how we can deliver international-standard engineering services for your facility.
